note: Synthetic data only. All names, reviews and scenarios are fictional. Do not submit real customer data to this repo.

reviews.author: S. Thompson
reviews.text: Absolutely love my personalised notebook. The gold foil lettering was perfect and arrived beautifully packaged in tissue paper. Will definitely order again for gifts.

reviews.author: M. Clarke
reviews.text: Ordered a Christmas gift in plenty of time but it arrived two weeks late. No tracking updates for 8 days. Customer service took 4 days to respond with a generic apology. Very disappointing.

reviews.author: R. Patel
reviews.text: The quality of the print on the photo book is stunning. Colours are vibrant and the paper feels premium. Perfect anniversary gift and my partner was thrilled.

reviews.author: J. Williams
reviews.text: The product itself is lovely but the price keeps going up. I used to order every month but now it feels too expensive for what it is. Will probably switch to a competitor.

reviews.author: L. Baker
reviews.text: Really happy with my diary, the personalisation looked great. Delivery was a day late but not a big deal. Packaging was a bit excessive with all the plastic wrap.

reviews.author: T. Harrison
reviews.text: Christmas disaster. Ordered December 10th for December 23rd delivery — guaranteed on your website. It arrived January 3rd. My daughter had nothing to open on Christmas morning. Absolutely ruined it.

reviews.author: A. Green
reviews.text: Same as everyone else — Christmas order did not arrive. Tracking showed it stuck in a depot for 10 days. No proactive communication from the brand whatsoever. Had to chase three times.

reviews.author: P. Edwards
reviews.text: Delivery estimate was wildly optimistic. I understand peak season is hard but there was zero communication when things went wrong. A simple update email would have gone a long way.

reviews.author: H. Morris
reviews.text: The gifting experience is second to none. The box, the tissue, the little card — it all felt so special when I gave it to my mum. She was genuinely moved.

reviews.author: C. Wilson
reviews.text: Product is fine. Website kept crashing on my phone when I tried to checkout. Took four attempts over two days to get the order through. Very frustrating.

reviews.author: F. Robinson
reviews.text: I've ordered from this brand every year for the last five years. The notebooks are genuinely the best I've found anywhere. The lay-flat binding on the larger sizes is perfect.

reviews.author: N. Taylor
reviews.text: Sent a personalised gift to my friend and the name was printed incorrectly. I double-checked my order and it was right there. Quality control is clearly an issue. No apology offered.

reviews.author: D. Anderson
reviews.text: Great quality as always. Only feedback is the website can be slow when uploading photos. Took about 10 minutes to upload 30 images which seemed excessive.

reviews.author: K. Martin
reviews.text: The notebook arrived with a dented corner — clearly from poor packaging. The product inside looked nice but I couldn't give it as a gift in that condition. Returns process was a pain.

reviews.author: O. Jackson
reviews.text: Ordered a personalised wedding guest book. The quality was exceptional — thick pages, beautiful foil cover. Our guests loved signing it. Could not recommend more highly.

reviews.author: B. White
reviews.text: Nice products but getting quite pricey. The diary was £28 which feels steep. Design selection is great though — much better than competitors like Moleskine for personalisation.

reviews.author: G. Lewis
reviews.text: Three weeks before Christmas and my order is lost. The courier tracking shows delivered but I never received it. Customer service are asking me to wait another 5 working days before they'll investigate. Unacceptable.

reviews.author: I. Walker
reviews.text: The personalisation tool on the website is brilliant — really easy to visualise exactly what you're getting. No surprises when it arrived. Exactly as shown.

reviews.author: E. Hall
reviews.text: Lovely notebook, arrived in perfect condition. The packaging was beautiful — felt like a proper gift even though I ordered it for myself. Perhaps slightly over-packaged for an eco perspective.

reviews.author: V. Allen
reviews.text: The mobile app crashed three times during checkout. Had to complete the purchase on desktop. A checkout that doesn't work on iPhone in 2026 is simply not good enough.

reviews.author: Q. Young
reviews.text: Gifted a personalised photo album to my parents for their anniversary. They were completely overwhelmed. The quality made it feel like an heirloom rather than a purchased gift.

reviews.author: U. King
reviews.text: Delivery took 9 days for standard shipping. The estimated date shown at checkout was 5 days. Not awful but the expectation-setting could be better.

reviews.author: X. Scott
reviews.text: Absolutely catastrophic Christmas experience. Ordered November 30th, tracking stopped updating December 8th. Contacted support six times. No resolution until January 5th when they finally reshipped. No compensation offered.

reviews.author: Z. Adams
reviews.text: Really high quality product. I only knocked one star because the foil personalisation on my notebook has started peeling after 3 weeks of daily use. Might be a durability issue worth looking into.

reviews.author: W. Campbell
reviews.text: Customer service team were fantastic when I made an error on my personalisation. They caught it before printing and messaged me to confirm. Saved what would have been a very disappointing order.

reviews.author: Y. Phillips
reviews.text: The stickers I ordered were fine but the packaging was over the top — way more plastic than necessary for a small item. They market themselves as a premium brand so I'd expect more thought on sustainability.

reviews.author: AA. Evans
reviews.text: I use their notebooks exclusively for work. The quality is consistent every single time. The paper takes fountain pen ink beautifully with minimal bleed-through.

reviews.author: BB. Turner
reviews.text: The product is good but I find the website quite slow and clunky on Safari. Filtering by design takes a while to load. Feels like it needs a technical refresh.

reviews.author: CC. Parker
reviews.text: Received a personalised item with someone else's name on it. Clearly a picking error. When I contacted customer service they were helpful but took 5 days to respond. Gift was for a birthday that had already passed.

reviews.author: DD. Collins
reviews.text: Love the designs — much more interesting than anything else I've found. Pricing is on the higher side but I think the quality justifies it. Delivery was exactly on time.

reviews.author: EE. Stewart
reviews.text: Bought the large format photo book for our family holiday. The colours are incredible and the print quality rivals professional photo labs. The unboxing experience was genuinely delightful.

reviews.author: FF. Morris
reviews.text: Delivery was significantly later than the estimated date. No communication from the brand — I had to log in and check the tracking myself. For a premium brand this is below par.

reviews.author: GG. Rogers
reviews.text: The personalisation quality is absolutely top tier. Font rendering is crisp, foil is vivid. I've compared to competitors and this brand is streets ahead on execution.

reviews.author: HH. Reed
reviews.text: Decent product but I do wonder if the pricing is creeping too high. Used to feel like accessible luxury — now it's just expensive. A loyalty discount would go a long way.

reviews.author: II. Cook
reviews.text: Order placed December 1st, guaranteed pre-Christmas delivery. Arrived December 27th. No compensation, no apology, just a 10% off voucher for a future order. I won't be placing one.

reviews.author: JJ. Morgan
reviews.text: Genuinely lovely gifting experience. The outer box, the tissue paper, the ribbon — every detail considered. The recipient thought I'd spent a fortune wrapping it myself.

reviews.author: KK. Bell
reviews.text: I'm a repeat customer and the product quality has stayed consistently high over the years. The new A4 notebook size is a great addition. Works perfectly as a desk journal.

reviews.author: LL. Murphy
reviews.text: The website is beautiful but it's slow. Product pages take forever to load on mobile. I almost gave up and ordered from a competitor. Sort out the performance please.

reviews.author: MM. Bailey
reviews.text: Product quality is good but the outer packaging arrived slightly crushed. The item inside was fine but it doesn't give a great first impression when it's a gift.

reviews.author: NN. Rivera
reviews.text: My daughter used them for her wedding stationery and it was flawless. The personalisation was beautiful and every single piece was printed perfectly. Many guests asked where she'd had it done.

reviews.author: OO. Cooper
reviews.text: Ordered a personalised gift. The text was cut off in the printed version even though it was fine in the preview. When I raised this, customer service offered a 20% discount but no reprint. Not good enough.

reviews.author: PP. Richardson
reviews.text: Really pleased with the product. Delivery was on time. Only minor issue: the protective sleeve on the notebook was split when it arrived. Easily resolved but slightly diminishes the premium feel.

reviews.author: QQ. Cox
reviews.text: Their notebooks are my one true luxury. I buy one every January and it makes me actually look forward to work. The personalisation adds such a personal touch. Never changing.

reviews.author: RR. Howard
reviews.text: The quality is still there but the prices have gone up significantly this year. I used to buy gifts for my whole team but now it's out of budget. Will have to find an alternative.

reviews.author: SS. Ward
reviews.text: Delivery took longer than expected and I had to follow up to get a tracking number. Customer service was helpful once I reached them but shouldn't have needed to chase.

reviews.author: TT. Torres
reviews.text: The new year collection designs are absolutely beautiful. Ordered the desk pad and it's transformed my workspace. The quality of the print and paper is exceptional.

reviews.author: UU. Peterson
reviews.text: Good product despite the Christmas delays everyone seems to have experienced. My order came 3 days late but the personalisation was spot on and the packaging was gorgeous.

reviews.author: VV. Gray
reviews.text: Christmas gift arrived January 2nd. My nephew was upset. I get that logistics is hard at Christmas but the estimated delivery date shown when I ordered gave me no indication of this risk.

reviews.author: WW. Ramirez
reviews.text: I've given their gifts to probably 20 people over the years. Every single one has been received with genuine delight. They have mastered what a gift should feel like.

reviews.author: XX. James
reviews.text: Product is good but I had trouble with the website editor on Chrome — some of the design elements weren't rendering correctly. Had to switch to Firefox to complete the personalisation.
